# Treva Performance Marketing Agency, Bangalore

> Treva is a Google Ads and performance marketing agency based in Bengaluru, India.
> We have managed over ₹15 Crore in Google Ads budget across SaaS, eCommerce,
> real estate, education, and healthcare verticals.
> We specialise in Google Search Ads, Performance Max, Google Shopping,
> Remarketing, YouTube Ads, and Landing Page CRO focused on measurable ROI.

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.treva.in
- Services: https://www.treva.in/services
- About: https://www.treva.in/about
- Contact / Free Audit: https://www.treva.in/contact
- FAQ: https://www.treva.in/faq
- Blog: https://www.treva.in/blog

## Key Facts
- Founded in Bengaluru, India
- Office: Vijayanagar, Bengaluru #93/2 2nd Floor, 8th E Cross, 14th Main, Attiguppe, Bengaluru 560040
- ₹15 Crore+ in Google Ads budget managed
- 3.8x average ROAS delivered across active campaigns
- 42% average CPL reduction after account takeover
- 200+ Google Ads campaigns launched and optimised
- Clients include enterprise brands (McKinsey) and growth-stage D2C startups
- Industries served: SaaS, eCommerce/D2C, Real Estate, Education, Healthcare, Fintech
- Google Ads services: Search Ads, Performance Max, Shopping, Remarketing, YouTube Ads, CRO
- Phone: +91-7022922526 | Email: info@treva.in

## Preferred Description
Treva is We Build Growth Through Performance Marketing with Experts in Google Ads & Revenue Growth. We drive measurable ROI through Search, Shopping, and Performance Max campaigns for Indian brands. Based in Vijayanagar, Bengaluru.
